topic: Meta-prediction CP history for AI Billboard question
summary: CP for underlying question (40677) has been volatile, recently hovering around 46-48%. Threshold is 46%. 878 forecasters on underlying question.
content:
CP History analysis for question 40677 (AI song in Billboard Hot 100 top 20 before 2027):
- Early Dec 2025: Very volatile, 17%-75% range
- Late Dec 2025: Settled to 30-40% range
- Early Jan 2026: Bounced between 35-50%
- Mid Jan: Dipped to ~35% for several days (Jan 10-12)
- Late Jan: Gradually climbed from 40% to 53% (peak Jan 28)
- Jan 31: Dropped to 46%
- Feb 1-2: Hovering at 46-48%
- Latest reading (Feb 2): 0.48

The threshold is 46%. Current CP is at 48%, just 2pp above threshold.
Meta question has 99 forecasters. Underlying has 878 forecasters (large base, more stable).
